reviews.comment:
Ya no vivo en santa fe desde  hace 20 años, pero cuando vivía allí iba siempre porque me  quedaba cerca de todo.
Me extrañó que siendo una estación fe YPF no tenga promociones de desayuno, que no tenga promociones con serviclub.
No tenían casi nada para vender.
Solo rescato la limpieza de los baños que es sumamente importante, y que tengan el ingreso con clave. Lo demás, me pareció todo caro. 500 pesos dos cortados con 2 medialunas.

(Translated by Google)
I haven't lived in Santa Fe for 20 years, but when I did, I used to go there all the time because it was close to everything.
I was surprised that, being a YPF station, they didn't have breakfast specials or any promotions with Serviclub. They had almost nothing to sell. The only positives were the cleanliness of the restrooms, which is extremely important, and the fact that they have a code for entry. Everything else seemed expensive. 500 pesos for two cortados and two croissants.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4770193588747859421/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURxOVpiWGJnEAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Varios surtidores. Funciona bien la aplicación YPF con puntos de los combustibles podés utilizarlo en el Shopp. Bien ubicado. A veces largas filas para el ingreso. Recomiendo mediodía o muy tarde

(Translated by Google)
Good service. Several pumps. The YPF app works well; you can use your fuel points at the shop. Well located. Sometimes there are long lines to get in. I recommend going midday or very late.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4770193588747859421/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNxNWFLbnhnRRAB
